name: Why use a knowledge graph instead of just keeping everything in a database table?

mainEntity.name: Why use a knowledge graph instead of just keeping everything in a database table?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, especially if you need to connect people, companies, places, events, and topics across different systems. The graph format is designed for relationship-heavy data, while a flat file is better for simple lookup tables.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use a graph when relationships matter more than flat rows and simple lookups.

description: Use a graph when relationships matter more than flat rows and simple lookups.
